title: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
summary_full: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".
summary_public: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire"
